description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script, run docker run --rm --privileged multiarch/qemu-user-static:register --reset, clone the manifest-tool repository, check out v0.9.0, build and install it with make, clone the qemu-static-conf repository and copy its *.conf files to /lib/binfmt.d, and log in to Docker Hub using the $DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN and $DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD variables. Then execute make in the script step. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
